evals.prompt: Execute the git diff workflow and generate a diff branch
evals.expected_output: Completed git fetch, compared differences with gracetech_master, extracted files in the fishmeet directory, synchronized fishmeet files to the corresponding directories, created a new branch and committed changes

evals.prompt: Compare fishmeet file differences between the current branch and the main branch, create a new branch and commit
evals.expected_output: Correctly filter files prefixed with fishmeet, process the paths and commit to the new _for-diff branch

evals.prompt: Synchronize code and create a diff commit branch
evals.expected_output: Fully execute the 4 steps and handle various edge cases (e.g., branch name conflicts, non-existent files, etc.)
